name: Drawer
description: A panel that slides in from screen edges. Extends the Dialog pattern with slide animations and edge positioning.

modal.description: Whether to render as modal (blocks interaction with rest of page)

when: Side panels for editing or creating content
Navigation panels that slide in from the left
Detail views that overlay the main content
whenNot: Small contextual menus (use Menu or Popover)
guidelines: Default to right side for content editing and forms
Use left side for navigation drawers
Use bottom for mobile-style action sheets
Provide clear close affordance (X button or cancel)
Keep drawer content focused on a single task
Drawer.Trigger and Drawer.Close with asChild require a single valid React element child
Set Drawer.Content initialFocus={false} when custom focus management is needed
accessibility: Automatically traps focus within the drawer
Returns focus to trigger element on close
Uses role="dialog" with proper aria attributes

examples.name: Default
examples.description: Right-side drawer with header, body, and footer
examples.code:
Drawer Title A panel sliding in from the right.

Drawer content goes here.

examples.name: Left Side
examples.code:
Navigation

Left-side drawer for navigation or filters.

examples.name: Bottom Sheet
examples.code:
Actions

Bottom sheet for mobile-style actions.

examples.name: With Form
examples.code:
<Drawer>
  <Drawer.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Edit Settings</Button>
  </Drawer.Trigger>
  <Drawer.Content size="md">
    <Drawer.Close />
    <Drawer.Header>
      <Drawer.Title>Settings</Drawer.Title>
      <Drawer.Description>Update your preferences.</Drawer.Description>
    </Drawer.Header>
    <Drawer.Body>
      <Stack gap="md">
        <Input label="Display Name" placeholder="Enter name" />
        <Input label="Email" type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
      </Stack>
    </Drawer.Body>
    <Drawer.Footer>
      <Drawer.Close asChild>
        <Button variant="secondary">Cancel</Button>
      </Drawer.Close>
      <Button variant="primary">Save Changes</Button>
    </Drawer.Footer>
  </Drawer.Content>
</Drawer>

relations.note: Use Dialog for centered modal overlays
Use Sidebar for permanent side navigation
Use Popover for small contextual content

propsSummary: modal: boolean - blocks page interaction (default: true)
Drawer.Content side: left|right|top|bottom - slide direction (default: right)
Drawer.Content initialFocus: boolean - auto-focus popup on open (default: true)
